notes: v0.10.0 released 2026-04-26. As of 2026-05-17, main has many merged PRs. Only 2 open Repo Assist PRs: #168 (perf: viewport rows, rebased this run) and #184 (refactor: From<&Package> for PackageDetail, new this run). PR #183 (Copilot) fixes truncated package ID upgrades - still open. Issues #158 and #169 still open (protected workflow files). Main has ~341 tests passing (without #168 viewport tests). CI is NOT running on Repo Assist PR branches (GitHub blocks CI for bot-created PRs). cargo clippy -- -D warnings passes cleanly. Pause_test_prs lifted - only 2 open PRs now, resume improvements.
